acceptance_criteria: The accepted figure set reproduces from the documented commands or any mismatch is recorded precisely.
Only the accepted figures remain wired into the narrative; stale figures on disk are not referenced as evidence.
Reproducibility notes, image paths, and citation links in the post are accurate.
A fresh hub validation record exists for the commands actually run.
constraints: Do not promote legacy figures or legacy experiment outputs merely because they are present in static/images/.
Record exact commands and artifacts used.
description: Run the accepted experiment entrypoints, confirm the current figure set, validate image-path usage in the draft, and recheck that the post cites the accepted evidence chain rather than stale assets.
goal: Verify that the figures, commands, and supporting citations used by the current draft reproduce and resolve cleanly.
implementation_notes: Superseded by task-021, which bundles final figures, metrics, and reproducibility around the clarified endgame story.
title: Accepted figure, repro, and citation verification for money-minsky-policy-mismatch
